title: sloanea pilosa
intro: Sloanea pilosa, also known as the hairy sloanea or hairy sloanea tree, is a plant species within the family Ebenaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory infections due to its antimicrobial and antipyretic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help protect against oxidative stress and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Sloanea pilosa include tea, infusions, and decoctions, which are often consumed to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
